Local Experts Who
Get It Right

Home›Products

Our Products

Quality flooring materials for every room and budget — shown in real homes we've completed across the Northport area.

Hardwood Flooring
Classic & Timeless

Hardwood Flooring

Nothing compares to the warmth and lasting beauty of real hardwood. We install solid and engineered hardwood in a wide range of species, stains, and plank widths to match your home's character.

With proper care, hardwood adds lasting value and can last a lifetime. We also refinish existing hardwood to bring it back to life.

  • Solid & engineered hardwood
  • Oak, maple, hickory, walnut & more
  • Nail-down, glue-down & floating
  • Sanding, staining & refinishing
  • Subfloor assessment & prep
Get a Free Quote
Luxury Vinyl Plank
Waterproof & Durable

Luxury Vinyl Plank

LVP is one of the most popular choices today — 100% waterproof, incredibly durable, easy to maintain, and available in stunning wood and stone looks that rival the real thing.

Perfect for kitchens, bathrooms, basements, and homes with pets or kids. We carry top-rated brands at competitive prices.

  • 100% waterproof construction
  • Floating & glue-down installation
  • Wide range of wood & stone visuals
  • Pet, child & scratch-resistant options
  • Great for any room, including basements
Get a Free Quote
Tile & Stone
Precision & Style

Tile & Stone

Our tile team delivers flawless results in kitchens, bathrooms, entryways, and showers. From classic subway tile to large-format porcelain, natural stone, and mosaics, we handle every style with precision.

Proper tile work starts with preparation — we level and waterproof every surface before the first tile is set.

  • Porcelain, ceramic, natural stone & mosaic
  • Floor, wall & custom shower tile
  • Large-format & custom pattern layouts
  • Waterproofing for wet areas
  • Grout selection, matching & sealing
Get a Free Quote
Carpet
Comfort & Warmth

Carpet

Carpet remains the top choice for bedrooms and living areas where comfort and quiet matter most. We offer a wide variety of styles, textures, and fibers from trusted brands.

Our professional installation stretches tightly and lasts for years — and we'll haul away your old carpet too.

  • Plush, berber, frieze & loop styles
  • Stain-resistant & pet-friendly options
  • Padding selection & installation
  • Stairs, hallways & custom cuts
  • Old carpet removal & disposal included
Get a Free Quote
Laminate
Affordable & Beautiful

Laminate

Laminate gives you the look of hardwood at a fraction of the cost. Modern laminate is incredibly realistic, highly durable, and simple to maintain — an excellent choice for high-traffic areas.

A smart, budget-friendly option that doesn't sacrifice style.

  • Realistic wood & stone look options
  • Scratch & fade-resistant wear layer
  • Click-lock floating installation
  • Commercial-grade options available
  • Moisture-resistant underlayment included
Get a Free Quote
No Pressure, No Obligation

Not Sure Which Floor
Is Right for You?

We'll come to your home, assess the space, and walk you through your best options — completely free.

Home›Services

Our Services

More than just flooring — we handle the whole project, from design and demo to installation and cleanup.

How We Help

Full-Service from
Start to Finish

01

Bathroom Remodeling

Full bathroom transformations — custom tile showers, tub surrounds, flooring, and more.

02

Hardwood Refinishing

Bring tired hardwood back to life with professional sanding, staining, and refinishing.

03

Residential Installation

Expert installation of every flooring type for homes throughout the Northport area.

04

Design Consultation

Not sure what works? We'll help you choose the right material, color, and layout for your space.

05

Carpet Disposal

We haul away and properly dispose of your old carpet and padding — no mess left behind.

06

Furniture Removal

We move and replace your furniture so you don't have to lift a thing on installation day.

07

Job Supervision & Coordination

We manage your project end to end, coordinating every step for a smooth, on-time finish.

08

Outdoor Installations

Durable flooring for porches, patios, sunrooms, and other outdoor living spaces.

One Call Does It All

Let's Talk About
Your Project

Whether it's a single room or a full remodel, we'll handle every detail. Reach out for a free estimate.

Home›About Us

About True Flooring

Locally owned and operated, built on craftsmanship, honesty, and a passion for beautiful floors.

Our Story

Rooted in Northport,
Built to Last

True Flooring Company was founded with a clear purpose: to bring expert-level flooring and remodeling services to homeowners in Northport and the greater Tuscaloosa area — without the franchise price tag or impersonal service.

We're a locally owned and operated business that treats every home the same way we'd treat our own. From the first consultation to the final walk-through, we're committed to honesty, quality, and your complete satisfaction.

Whether you're renovating one room or transforming your entire home, you'll work directly with our experienced team every step of the way. No surprises, no shortcuts — just floors done right.

Work With Us
What We Stand For

Our Core Values

🧭

True Craftsmanship

We take our name seriously. Every install is executed with precision and a commitment to doing it right the first time.

🤝

Honest Service

Straightforward pricing, no hidden fees, no hard selling. We recommend what's genuinely best for you and your home.

🏠

Community First

As a locally owned business, we're invested in Northport. Supporting our community is at the heart of what we do.

⭐

100% Satisfaction

We don't consider a job done until you're completely happy. Your satisfaction is our greatest measure of success.

Where We Serve

Northport &
Surrounding Communities

Based in Northport, Alabama, we proudly serve homeowners throughout Tuscaloosa County and neighboring communities. Not sure if we cover your area? Just give us a call.
